notes: 3.10.10: Nut 'Tai ve may / Cai dat' (PWA install) tren header giờ LUON hien thi (truoc bi an cho beforeinstallprompt nen may desktop/iOS khong thay). pwaInstall() da xu ly du: Android/Chrome (prompt), iOS Safari (huong dan Add to Home Screen), desktop Chrome/Edge (huong dan icon thanh dia chi), da cai roi (thong bao). Chi an nut khi app dang chay standalone (da cai). Khong doi logic khac.
